content:
# Final Review Proposal
**Producer:** agent:claude/claude-opus-4-7-max

## Summary

Reviewed the additive test file tests/unit/milestone_store_integration_test.rs (1038 lines, 25 tests) plus the one-line tests/unit.rs registration. Verified via git diff that only additive changes were made. Ran the tests: all 25 pass in under one second (well under the 5-second target). Cross-checked the test expectations against the source API: FsMilestoneStore/FsMilestoneJournalStore/FsMilestoneSnapshotStore/FsMilestonePlanStore/FsTaskRunLineageStore signatures, create_milestone/update_status/persist_plan/record_bead_start/record_bead_completion argument orders, AppError variants (CorruptRecord{file,details}, InvalidIdentifier, InvalidConfigValue{value,reason}), MilestoneJournalEvent schema (timestamp/event_type/from_state/to_state/actor/reason/metadata), MilestoneSnapshot fields, and PendingMilestoneStateCommit recovery semantics (.state-commit.json sidecar + XOR-mask apply-on-read in read_snapshot). Lifecycle-rule assertions line up with allowed_transition_targets (Completed->nothing, Planning->only Ready, Running->Completed blocked while beads open). find_runs_for_bead sorts by started_at so the retry-ordering assertions are deterministic. Journal truncated-tail tolerance vs. mid-stream 'line N malformed' CorruptRecord behavior matches read_journal_from_path. The atomic-write test correctly relies on the sidecar-recovery path and the recovery_action snake_case serde representation. Test file does not modify source code, uses tempfile isolation, has clear assertion messages, and introduces no new clippy warnings in the test binary. The pre-existing clippy -D warnings failure in src/contexts/workflow_composition/completion.rs (items_after_test_module) is present on master unchanged and is outside this bead's scope. No real bugs, correctness gaps, or safety issues found in the changes under review.

## Amendments

None.
